description: Expected parse results for mixed-format test fixtures. Tests auto-detection behavior when multiple formats coexist.

01_log4j_and_plain.log.note: Primarily log4j format with plain text banners mixed in. Auto-detect should still identify as log4j because >60% of lines match the log4j pattern.

02_json_and_text.log.note: Mix of JSON structured logs and plain text banners/stack traces. Auto-detect should identify as JSON.
